evidence.behavior: one repository contract insertion routes qualifying ACAC or product-idea incidents to the existing self-improve prompt
evidence.dependency: interfaces=none beyond existing AGENTS.md guidance and prompt asset references
evidence.uncertainty: existing prompt and trigger conditions already exist; wording scope is narrow
evidence.verification: checks=not-configured command classes plus targeted diff review and stage validators
evidence.guardrails: no schema/api contract change; no new deps; localized surface; reversible with straightforward verification

overrides.reason: The work is a one-file contract change plus verification and principles review, so a 2-phase plan is sufficient even though the locked goal count requires an L2 range.
